title: Wolven's built in resource pack
description: This resource pack is for a curseforge modpack I'm making!
body:
Hello! SCPfan173 here! I abandoned both my 2 previous packs cause I'm just like that :3! This resource pack was originally curseforge exclusive since it was for a modpack called Wolven, which is based off of better than wolves.

Curseforge Page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wolvens-built-in-texture-tweaker

Update: Was too lazy to update the modrinth page
